response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with approximately 14-16 years of experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems, and has recently begun touching AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at their current role. However, the role targets a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud platform strategy experience — none of which are evidenced. There is no track record of engineering leadership at the principal/director scale, no shipped AI products, and limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK exposure only). Strong craftsmanship credentials but a clear mismatch for an AI strategy principal role.
strengths: ~14+ years of polyglot engineering across web, backend, mobile, and embedded systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise as required
No evidence of director-level or principal-scale engineering leadership / strategy work
Limited cloud platform depth — only modest AWS CDK exposure, no broad cloud strategy track record

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
No principal/director-level IC leadership track record
